name: Terry Sullivan
subject: Are you in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566600:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)
---
Peter, Since Marco announced his candidacy yesterday evening over 6,000 people have become Day One Supporters. Will you be joining them? **[>> Click here to donate any amount & receive a decal <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566601:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)** **[> > Click here to donate $35 or more & receive a T-shirt <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566602:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)****[> > Click here to donate $100 or more & receive an autographed poster <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566603:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)** **[> > Click here to donate $250 or more & receive a signed photo <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566604:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)** While it's true we may be months away from the first caucuses, primaries, and conventions, we need all the support we can get today to launch Marco's campaign with the momentum we need to win! [Please, take a few minutes this morning and show your support for Marco on Day One!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566605:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r) Terry Sullivan Campaign Manager Marco Rubio for President [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566605:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566606:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)

name: Jeanette Rubio
subject: Marco needs us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41571348:16551010109:m:1:1349778030:EB2F41220503099F80CAA8347937BAE3:r)
---
Peter,
When Marco launched his campaign for the United States Senate a little over six years ago, many people were afraid to support him at first. We still remember the dedicated family, friends, and supporters who were with us from day one of that campaign. As you know, Marco went on to exceed everyone's expectations and proudly serves the people of Florida in the Senate today. Now, Marco needs us again. It's been less than 24 hours since we stood with our family and friends at the Freedom Tower in Miami as Marco launched his presidential campaign and already thousands have shown their support from day one. [_**I want to invite you to join them and donate here to become a Day One Supporter.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41571349:16551010109:m:1:1349778030:EB2F41220503099F80CAA8347937BAE3:r) I'm proud to join Marco in this next step of our life together and want you to know how grateful he and I are that we can count on your support. Thank you, Jeanette Rubio
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41571350:16551010109:m:1:1349778030:EB2F41220503099F80CAA8347937BAE3:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41571351:16551010109:m:1:1349778030:EB2F41220503099F80CAA8347937BAE3:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41571352:16551010109:m:1:1349778030:EB2F41220503099F80CAA8347937BAE3:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Breaking: race now a tossup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Right now, this is anyone's race to win -- Political analysts are calling it a "Pure Tossup."Friend -- Yesterday, Marco Rubio officially entered the race for President in 2016, and in doing so, removed himself from the Senate race in Florida. I want to make one thing clear: Rubio's announcement doesn't change the core principles of my campaign. **But it does mean we have to be prepared for a new Republican opponent.** That's why I'm asking for your help. Right now, this is anyone's race to win -- Political analysts are calling it a "Pure Tossup." And with Rubio out, Republicans are about to enter this race and target me with everything they have. **Will you chip in today to help me take them on?**

_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

**[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-04-14_b1_pm_ldnd-rem&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Security Through Strength
body:
| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

Thank you for signing up to receive email updates from Security Through Strength. We appreciate your willingness to join our team as we look for the best way to take back our country in 2016!

We will keep you posted on our plans as they progress over the next few months.

Sincerely,

Thad Westbrook
Treasurer |

| Paid for by Security Through Strength

name: Marco Rubio for President
subject: Watch: A New American Century
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41574092:16555260554:m:1:1349778030:08EB245FA4235E4B0AC213F70F4BB6AA:r)
---
#
Peter, Yesterday, at the iconic Freedom Tower in Miami, surrounded by family, friends, and supporters, I announced my campaign for President of the United States of America. It was a special day and I'm so grateful for the support of so many already. Our team just produced this video featuring some exclusive highlights and a behind the scenes look at my day yesterday and the event. [**_Click here to watch the video._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41574093:16555260554:m:1:1349778030:08EB245FA4235E4B0AC213F70F4BB6AA:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41574093:16555260554:m:1:1349778030:08EB245FA4235E4B0AC213F70F4BB6AA:r) Yesterday was amazing and the launch of our campaign was a huge success. We need your help to sustain the momentum. [_**So click here, watch the video, donate to our campaign, and invite your friends to join us.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41574093:16555260554:m:1:1349778030:08EB245FA4235E4B0AC213F70F4BB6AA:r) Sincerely, Marco
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41574094:16555260554:m:1:1349778030:08EB245FA4235E4B0AC213F70F4BB6AA:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41574095:16555260554:m:1:1349778030:08EB245FA4235E4B0AC213F70F4BB6AA:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41574096:16555260554:m:1:1349778030:08EB245FA4235E4B0AC213F70F4BB6AA:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |

name: Katie Dowd
subject: We're on the road
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Follow along. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI0ODQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxNDk0MjA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

And we're off. Immediately after kicking off her campaign, Hillary hit the road headed for Iowa to hear from people like you about what matters most in this election.

That's what you can expect for the next few weeks -- not big rallies, but real conversations about what matters for our country.

**You might not be able to meet her in person, but you can still be a part of the action. Follow Hillary on the road on Facebook and Twitter today, and be a part of the team from wherever you are:**

| | | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI0ODQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxNDk0MjA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjI0ODQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxNDk0MjA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
We'll make sure you're getting photos and videos from the trail and the latest and greatest info on what you can do to support Hillary.

Be the first of your friends to know what's going on -- share what you love with the people who need to hear it.

Cheers,

Katie

Katie Dowd
Digital Director
Hillary for America

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI0ODQ1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxNDk0MjA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
